sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt64, rectLow UInt64, rectHigh UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_data (id, rectLow, rectHigh) VALUES (1, 5178914411069187297, 5177056748191934217);
SELECT s2RectUnion(rectLow, rectHigh, 5179062030687166815, 5177056748191934217) AS rectUnion FROM geo_data WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE geo_data SET rectHigh = 5179062030687166815 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT s2RectUnion(rectLow, 5178914411069187297, rectHigh, 5179062030687166815) AS rectUnion FROM geo_data;
